task_objective: Fix crash when correlation sample_size exceeds row_count (Issue #3)
design_decisions: Clamped sampling fraction to 1.0 to prevent Ibis backend errors.
Only set is_sampled to True if a reduction in data actually occurred (fraction < 1.0).
Maintained fallback to limit() for additional robustness.
results: Successfully implemented clamping, added regression tests, passed PE review, and opened PR #6.
